zh.Eglinton Castle, Kilwinning, Ayrshire, S: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie於1482年4月21日出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素時，她的父親Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie22歲，母親Lady Helen Campbell21歲。她於1501年3月13日與Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair在蘇格蘭艾丁波結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1523年2月12日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓享年40歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: Scottish spelling of   Montgomery  .

variants.name: Montgomery
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie was born on 21 April 1482, in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie, was 22 and her mother, Lady Helen Campbell, was 21. She married Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair on 13 March 1501, in Edinburgh, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 12 February 1523, in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 40, and was buried in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie est née le 21 avril 1482, à Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Helen Campbell, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair le 13 mars 1501, à Edinburgh, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 février 1523, à Eglinton, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterrée à Eglinton, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.Eglinton Castle, Kilwinning, Ayrshire, S: Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie am 21. April 1482 in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Helen Campbell 21. Sie hat am 13. März 1501 in Edinburgh, Scotland Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Februar 1523 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Eglinton, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair il 13 marzo 1501, nel Edinburgh, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Montgomerieが1482年4月21日にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントン カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerieは22歳，母Lady Helen Campbellは21歳であった。1501年3月13日にスコットランドエディンブルグでSir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blairと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1523年2月12日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントンで40歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie(이)가 1482년 4월 21일 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 그린턴 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Helen Campbell(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1501년 3월 13일 스컷랜드 에딘버그h에서 Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1523년 2월 12일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Montgomerie родилась 21 апреля 1482 г. в местности эглинтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Montgomerie 1st Earl of Eglington - 3rd Earl of Montgomerie было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Helen Campbell, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Blair of that Ilk, 9th Lord of Blair 13 марта 1501 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 12 февраля 1523 г. в местности эглинтон, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 40 лет и была похоронена в местности эглинтон, аиршир, Шотландия.
